meta_description: AXIUM GROUP — digital transformation, design, web & mobile development, ERP & CRM integration and consulting in Senegal.
lang_switch_aria: Language for the whole site (all pages)
lang_switch_fr_title: French — show the entire site in French
lang_switch_en_title: English — show the entire site in English
footer_attribution: Original structure and layout: reference site — rights reserved by their owners. Content, logo and commercial offer: AXIUM GROUP. See ATTRIBUTION.txt in the project.
flash_honeypot: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
flash_name: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
flash_email: Please enter a valid email address.
flash_message_short: Describe your need in a few lines (minimum 10 characters).
flash_message_long: Message too long. Please reduce to 8,000 characters maximum.
flash_contact_success: Thank you! We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.
flash_contact_log_error: Your message could not be saved (server write permission). Please email contact@axium.sn directly or try again later.
contact_page_lead: A question, a project or a partnership? Use the form below or open your mail app — we’ll get back to you as soon as we can.
hero_lead: AXIUM GROUP supports you from design to operations: user experience, web and mobile applications, ERP & CRM integration and consulting — with the strength of a group and the proximity of a team in Senegal and across Africa.
about_p1: At AXIUM, we place innovation at the heart of everything we do. Building tailored technology solutions that turn your challenges into growth opportunities is our daily commitment.
about_p2: Thanks to our expertise and the strength of a group, we help clients stay ahead in their sector. Together, we anticipate tomorrow’s trends and build lasting success.
about_p3: Our ambition: to be your trusted partner to navigate, with confidence, an ever-changing technology landscape.
about_highlight: From design to production, AXIUM GROUP aligns digital strategy, design, development and business tools (ERP, CRM, management systems) to deliver measurable results. Your priorities become our roadmap — with the rigour and closeness of a team committed by your side.
svc_ui_p: Give your users a smooth, intuitive experience through polished user journeys and elegant web/mobile design. Make your digital services comfortable to use while engaging your audience from the very first interaction.
svc_home_mobile_p: Native or cross-platform mobile apps, API integration and store releases — stable products built for real-world use in the field.
svc_home_web_p: Showcase sites, business portals and custom web apps with secure, maintainable code from design to production.
svc_erp_p: Unify sales, purchasing, inventory and customer relationships: tool selection, configuration, integration with your apps, team training and maintenance. We help you get the most from your information system.
svc_consult_p: Rely on our expertise to design IT solutions tailored to your needs. From project design to technical support, we guide you toward digital success.
portfolio_placeholder: Coming soon — project gallery, case studies and client feedback.
cta_panel_lead: Fill in the form: we receive your message without you opening your email app. You can also use the options below.
form_privacy: By submitting this form, you agree that we use this information to contact you back.
cta_mailto_desc: Subject and starter text pre-filled to
cta_details_summary: Copy address or a template (Gmail web, etc.)
cta_tip1: Mention your sector and type of need (website, app, consulting, etc.).
cta_tip2: Add a deadline if you have one.
about_page_tagline: The digital heart of the new Africa
cta_mail_template:
Subject: Getting in touch — digital project (AXIUM GROUP)

Hello,

I would like to discuss a project:
- Organisation / sector:
- Main need (website, mobile app, consulting, etc.):
- Desired timeline or deadline:
- Contact details:

Kind regards,
cta_js_email_ok: Address copied. Open your mail app and paste it into the recipient field.
cta_js_template_ok: Template copied. Paste it into the message body, then complete the lines.
cta_js_copy_fail: Automatic copy failed: select the text shown above or the email, then Ctrl+C.
services_page_lead: From experience design to mobile and web applications, plus ERP & CRM integration and IT consulting: a full offer to steer your digital transformation.
services_scope_blurb: Every engagement follows the same standard: understand your context, secure technical choices and deliver solutions people use every day.
sp_ui_p: Smooth, intuitive experiences: user journeys, information architecture, prototyping and web/mobile UI design. We craft each screen so your digital services are clear, engaging and aligned with business goals.
sp_mobile_p: Native or cross-platform apps (iOS & Android), API integration, store publishing and performance monitoring. Stable, scalable apps built for real-world and mobile use.
sp_web_p: Showcase sites, business portals, custom web apps and back-offices, PWAs and integrations (payments, CRM, ERP…). From design to production: maintainable, secure code ready to grow with you.
sp_erp_p: Improve how you run the business: ERP & CRM selection and rollout, customisation, integration with existing tools, training and maintenance — securing your information system at every step.
sp_consult_p: Audits, project framing, tooling choices, security and change management. We help structure digital initiatives and secure operations with responsive support and tailored recommendations.
services_cta_back: See the overview on the home page
real_page_lead: Delivered projects, clients supported and areas of expertise: this page is designed to showcase your impact.
real_note: To showcase your references or case studies, get in touch — we can add visuals, copy and links to match your brand.
about_manifest_html:
Axium Group was born from a strong conviction: Africa must not merely follow the global technology revolution — it must become a major player in it.

In a context where African companies face structural, technological and financial challenges, Axium Group positions itself as a catalyst for transformation, building an integrated ecosystem that combines technology, finance and innovation.

🚀 A clear vision: durably transform African businesses

Axium Group is not limited to providing services.

We rethink how companies operate, grow and create value.

Our ambition is to:

  • Accelerate the digitalisation of African businesses
  • Simplify access to modern financial services
  • Create technology solutions suited to local realities
  • Foster the emergence of African champions competitive on a global scale

🌍 A unique ecosystem for performance

Axium Group relies on complementary entities designed to meet the continent’s major challenges:

  • Axium Digital: digital transformation, technology development and information systems structuring
  • Axium Bank: next-generation financial services, designed for a connected Africa
  • BiPay: accessible, innovative payment, savings and investment solutions

By combining these areas of expertise, Axium Group creates powerful synergy, able to support companies at every stage of their growth.

💡 An approach focused on impact and results

We believe technology only has value if it generates real impact.

That is why our solutions are designed to:

  • Improve business productivity
  • Optimise their operations
  • Increase their profitability
  • Deliver a better customer experience

🔥 An ambition: redefine standards in Africa

Axium Group embodies a new generation of African players:

ambitious, innovative and resolutely forward-looking.

Our objective is clear:

to become an essential reference for digital and financial transformation in Africa, laying the foundations of a modern, inclusive and sustainable ecosystem.

✨ Axium Group is not just a company.

It is a vision.

It is a movement.

It is the future of African businesses.
